类 TornaRequestInfo

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.torna.TornaRequestInfo
public class TornaRequestInfo extends Object
Print the log of pushing documents to Torna

    说明
    String
    buildInfo()
    Builds a full log string including both request and response data.

    Builds a log string containing only request data (no response).

    • buildInfo

      public String buildInfo()
      Builds a full log string including both request and response data.
      返回:
      Formatted log string with request and response details

    • buildRequestInfo

      public String buildRequestInfo()
      Builds a log string containing only request data (no response).
      返回:
      Formatted log string with request details only
